error.message_pattern: Invalid\ dataset\ ID\ "!!bad\-dataset!!"\.\ Dataset\ IDs\ must\ be\ alphanumeric\ \(plus\ underscores\ and\ dashes\)\ and\ must\ be\ at\ most\ 1024\ characters\ long\.
error.message_sample: Invalid dataset ID "!!bad-dataset!!". Dataset IDs must be alphanumeric (plus underscores and dashes) and must be at most 1024 characters long.
